name: Chewy Brownie Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Place a sheet of foil on a baking tray.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the Crisco, brown sugar, water, and vanilla extract with an electric mixer until well combined.
4. Add the eggs and beat until thoroughly mixed.
5. Stir the flour, cocoa, salt, and baking soda in a separate bowl.
6. Gradually add this dry mixture to the sugar mixture, beating on low speed just until blended.
7. Mix in the chocolate chips.
8. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto the ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 7-9 minutes, or until set but still soft and moist. Do not overbake.
10. Allow cookies to cool on the baking tray for 2 minutes before transferring them to the prepared foil.
11. Let cool completely. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
